artifacts.summary: Research on enforcement mechanisms for preventing orchestrator bypass of skill delegation when writing plan artifacts. Recommends layered defense: PostToolUse validation hook (primary), command spec hardening (secondary), local .memory/ feedback entry (tertiary).
4-phase implementation plan: PostToolUse validation hook, command spec hardening, .memory/ feedback entry, verification
Implementation summary for task 416: layered defense against skill delegation bypass

completion_summary: Implemented 3-layer enforcement system: PostToolUse validation hook (.claude/hooks/validate-plan-write.sh) validates artifact writes against format standards, anti-bypass constraint sections added to plan/research/implement command specs, and .memory/ entry persists the delegation requirement across sessions.
claudemd_suggestions: Consider adding the PostToolUse hook pattern documentation to .claude/context/ for reference by future meta tasks that need similar infrastructure-level enforcement.
